title: Named Entity Disambiguation (AIDA-CoNLL)
description: Named entity disambiguation and linking to Wikidata knowledge base based on the AIDA-CoNLL dataset. Annotators identify named entity mentions in news text, classify them by type (PER, ORG, LOC, MISC), and link them to their corresponding Wikidata entities using QIDs, handling ambiguous references and NIL entities.
citation:

    booktitle = "Proceedings of the 2011 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing",
